title: As a signed-in user, I want to view my order history so that I can track past purchases

acceptance_criteria.given: a signed-in user navigates to My Orders
acceptance_criteria.then: they see all past orders sorted by date descending showing order number, date, status, and total

acceptance_criteria.given: a signed-in user clicks on an order
acceptance_criteria.then: they see all items ordered, quantities, individual prices, delivery address, and current status

acceptance_criteria.given: a user attempts to access another user's order by manipulating the order ID in the URL
acceptance_criteria.then: they receive a 404 — the order is not found and no information about its existence is revealed

acceptance_criteria.given: a user has more than 10 orders
acceptance_criteria.then: orders are paginated with 10 per page and pagination controls allow navigation
they see: You have not placed any orders yet with a link to the catalogue

non_functional_requirements.performance: Order list loads in under 500ms at P95
non_functional_requirements.security: Orders scoped to authenticated user — user ID from JWT not request body. Unauthenticated requests redirected to login.
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Order status communicated with text not colour alone. Table has proper column headers.

definition_of_done: IDOR test passes: user cannot access other user orders
